name: Komehyo Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Komehyo Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the purchase and sale of used and new products through stores in Japan. The company offers jewelry, metals, clocks, bags, cloths, cameras, musical instruments, and other stocks, as well as car tire, aluminum wheel, and auto equipment. It is also involved in the lease of real estate properties. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Nagoya, Japan.
